pom.xml.general_idea: Updated the parent POM version to 1.5.10 to align with the new project structure and dependencies.
Renamed the project artifact, name, description, and URLs from 'association-app' to 'ucronia-app' to reflect the new application identity.
Updated SCM, issue management, and CI management URLs to point to the new 'ucronia-app-backend' repository.
Updated the GitHub Packages distribution management URL to match the new repository name.
Changed the target Java version from 17 to 21 to migrate the project to JDK 21.
Updated the manifest name property to reflect the new project package structure.
Added Apache POI dependency for Excel file handling capabilities.
Added ArchUnit dependency for architecture testing.
Added AssertJ dependency for fluent assertions in tests.
Added custom framework validation dependency.
Added custom framework Spring WS starter dependency.
Added custom framework Spring WS security starter dependency.
Added custom framework architecture tests dependency.
Added Apache Commons Codec dependency for encoding utilities.
Added Jakarta Validation API dependency.
Added SLF4J logging facade dependency.
Upgraded Spring Boot to version 3.4.6 to support JDK 21 and access new features.
Upgraded Spring Data release train to 2024.1.7 to align with Spring Boot 3.4.
Upgraded Spring Framework to version 6.2.8 to align with Spring Boot 3.4.
Updated the Maven site skin version to 2.4.1.
Declared the custom validation framework as a direct dependency.
Declared the custom Spring WS starter as a direct dependency.
Declared the custom Spring WS security starter as a direct dependency.
Declared the custom architecture tests framework as a direct dependency.
Excluded a transitive dependency from spring-boot-starter-validation to manage version conflicts or remove unused libraries.

.github/workflows/test.yml.general_idea: Updated the CI workflow to test against JDK 20 in addition to JDK 17, preparing for the migration to JDK 21.
Replaced a reusable workflow call with an inline job definition to allow for custom matrix configuration and explicit step control.
.github/workflows/test.yml.human_impl:
runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps:
- name: Check-out
  uses: actions/checkout@v4

.github/workflows/test.yml.general_idea: Updated GitHub Actions dependencies to their latest major versions (v4) for checkout and setup-java.
Explicitly set the Java distribution to 'temurin' in the setup-java action.
Enabled Maven dependency caching in the CI workflow to improve build performance.
Changed the Maven command from the default (likely 'test') to 'verify' to include integration tests in the CI run.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added .env to .gitignore to prevent committing Docker environment variables.

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the build stage base image from Maven with JDK 11 to Maven with Eclipse Temurin JDK 22 to support the target Java version.
Upgrade the deployment stage base image from OpenJDK 14 to Eclipse Temurin JRE 22 to match the target Java version.
Switch from `mvn dependency:resolve` to `mvn dependency:go-offline` for more robust dependency caching in the build stage.
Refine COPY instructions to separate source code from the full context to improve Docker layer caching efficiency.
Add `--batch-mode` flag to the Maven build command to ensure non-interactive execution in the container.
Replace `curl` with `wget` in the health check command, likely because `curl` is not available in the new Alpine-based JRE image.
docker/Dockerfile.human_impl: CMD wget -T5 -qO- http://localhost:8080/actuator/health | grep UP || exit 1

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Create a dedicated non-root user ('runner') and group for security best practices in the container.
docker/Dockerfile.human_impl: RUN addgroup -S runners && adduser --disabled-password -S runner -G runners

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Create a logs directory, assign ownership to the runner user, and expose it as a volume for persistent logging.
Change the CMD instruction from shell form to exec form to ensure proper signal handling and process management.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Restrict database and backend port bindings to localhost for improved security.
Correct the PostgreSQL healthcheck command to use the correct user flag and remove invalid database argument.
Mount a SQL script to initialize database schemas on container startup.
Move environment variables to an external .env file and remove hardcoded secrets.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added env_file: .env and removed inline JWT/CORS variables

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Persist application logs to a named volume for external consumption.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added volume association-logs:/app/logs and env logging.file.path=./logs

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add Prometheus service for metrics collection.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added prometheus service definition with image prom/prometheus:v2.53.1

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add Promtail service to ship logs to Loki.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added promtail service definition with image grafana/promtail:2.9.0

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add Loki service for log aggregation.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added loki service definition with image grafana/loki:2.9.0

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add Grafana service for visualization of metrics and logs.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added grafana service definition with image grafana/grafana:11.1.1

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Define explicit Docker networks to segment application, database, and monitoring traffic.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added networks section with app, db, and monitoring definitions

readme.md.general_idea: Rename the project from 'Association App' to 'Ucronia App' to reflect the new association name.
readme.md.human_impl: Changed title to '# Ucronia App Backend' and description to 'Backend app for the Ucronía association.'

readme.md.general_idea: Remove documentation and Javadoc badges from the README to simplify the header.
readme.md.human_impl: Deleted lines containing [![Release docs]... and [![Release javadocs]... badges.

readme.md.general_idea: Simplify the documentation section by removing links to generated release/develop docs and javadocs.
readme.md.human_impl: Removed lists of links to [site-release], [javadoc-release], [site-develop], [javadoc-develop] and their descriptions.

readme.md.general_idea: Update local query URL and Docker project name to match the new project identity.
readme.md.human_impl: Changed query URL to 'http://localhost:8080' and docker project name to 'ucronia-backend'.

readme.md.general_idea: Add information about included monitoring tools in the Docker setup.
readme.md.human_impl: Added 'Monitoring' section mentioning Grafana at http://localhost:3000.

readme.md.general_idea: Update GitHub and SCM links to point to the new repository name.
Remove link references that are no longer used in the document.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Reorganized the master changelog to group includes by domain (General, Association, Inventory, Security) and updated file references to match new module structure.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.human_impl: Replaced includes for member.yaml, balance.yaml, etc., with configuration.yaml, association.yaml, funds.yaml, people.yaml, inventory.yaml, library.yaml, and auth.yaml.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Moved authentication initialization logic to a classpath resource to decouple it from the file-system relative structure.
Removed inline changeSets that executed SQL files for sequence and auth initialization, likely because this logic was moved into the new included changelog files.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.human_impl: Deleted changeSets 'initial_sequences' and 'auth_initial_data' which referenced data/initialize_association_sequences.sql and data/auth/*.sql.

src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.general_idea: Updated console appender pattern to include color highlighting and thread information for better readability.
Replaced static File appender with RollingFile appender to support log rotation based on time and size.
Configured specific policies for log file rollover including startup, size limit, and time-based triggers.
Added the file appender reference to the application logger to ensure logs are written to the rolling file.
Removed the unused Properties block defining the filename since the new RollingFile appender uses hardcoded paths.

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.general_idea: Update test SQL data to match the new database schema where fees are linked to transactions and use a schema prefix.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.human_impl: INSERT INTO association.transactions ...; INSERT INTO association.fees ...

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.general_idea: Update test SQL data to reflect the new database schema where fees are linked to transactions and use 'person_id' instead of 'member_id'.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.human_impl: INSERT INTO association.transactions ...; INSERT INTO association.fees (id, person_id, date, paid, transaction_id) ...

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/multip.general_idea: Update test SQL data to reflect the new database schema where fees are linked to transactions and persons.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/multip.human_impl: INSERT INTO association.transactions ...; INSERT INTO association.fees ...
